title: Palm Farm: Idle Crops
description:
Welcome to Palm Farm — a relaxing desktop idle farming game. Plant crops, gather resources, upgrade, and tease the birds. Tap or click for extra coins, expand your little farm, and enjoy the slow, satisfying journey from seed to harvest.

🌱 Buy Seeds, Plant Crops：Buy crop seeds at the shop, and your little animals will plant them for you. Just wait for them to grow and enjoy a bountiful harvest!

✨ Use Magical Items to Make Planting More Fun:：You can buy magical helpers like the Rain Cloud, Magic Broom, and Transport Robot from the shop — and make your farm great again!

🐣 Gather More Animal Friends to the Farm：More animals keep joining the farm! They weed, plant, and fertilize — happily busy as can be!

⚡ Don't forget to upgrade your machines!

Use Crystals to upgrade your machines and make your farm run even better.

🐦 In your free time, you can also have some fun with the little birds~

More exciting things are waiting for you to discover!!!
description_short: A relaxing idle desktop farming game where you grow crops, gather resources, upgrade facilities, tease little birds, earn extra coins by clicking or typing, and expand your farm at a laid-back pace.
